title: SGLang GitHub closed issues and PRs scheduled crawler supplement manifest
scope_note: Daily scheduled crawler Markdown page snapshots after the 2026-07-08 supplement; this is page-level evidence, not a full API corpus refresh with joined comments and review comments.
